name: Almond-Raisin Biscotti
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup Lightly Toasted and Coarsely Chopped Almonds
2 Tablespoons Chopped Candied Orange Peel (Or) 3 Tablespoons Orange Zest, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F. Butter a baking sheet or line it with parchment.
2. In a large bowl, beat the egg yolks with 3/4 cup of sugar until light and dissolved. Stir in the melted butter, almonds, raisins, and orange peel.
3. In a separate bowl, beat the egg whites until they just begin to form peaks. Gradually beat in the remaining 3/4 cup sugar until the whites form stiff peaks.
4. Sift together the flour and baking powder. Alternately fold 1/3 of the flour into the yolks, then 1/3 of the egg whites. Repeat until well combined. The dough will be firm and slightly sticky.
5. Divide the dough into two logs about 1 1/2 inches wide. Arrange on the prepared baking sheet and bake for 20 to 25 minutes or until lightly browned and firm to touch.
6. Remove from oven and set rack. Cut logs diagonally into slices 1/2 inch wide. Return slices to sheet and bake for 5 to 7 minutes per side, until very lightly browned and crisp.
7. Cool on racks and store in airtight containers.
